_patch_meta.description: Dimension Review C13 Reg 24 (condemnation): 10 groups assigned. 2 dimension changes from automated labels (3189-003 Volition→Emotion-Negative; 3252-001 Divine-Human Correspondence→Dependence/Creatureliness; 738-001 Moral Character→Emotion-Negative). Registry stamp set.

set.notes: Justice as God's defining inner character — stable disposition of right dealing flowing from divine nature. AVs Deu 32:4 and Isa 5:16 both confirm. Automated label confirmed.
Justice as human inner moral orientation — disposition to seek, do, love right. AVs Job 29:14 and Mic 6:8 confirm. Automated label confirmed.

Inner cry for justice — anguish and longing of person denied right. AVs Job 19:7 and Hab 1:4 show primarily affective states (grief, anguish) not volitional acts. Changed from automated Volition to Emotion — Negative.

operations.description: 3189-003 mish.pat — condemnation: Emotion — Negative, HUMAN (changed from Volition)

set.notes: Inner posture of appeal before divine judgment — standing before God, crying out in affliction, trusting in divine hearing and saving. AV 2Ch 20:9 is precise. Changed from automated Divine-Human Correspondence to Dependence / Creatureliness.

operations.description: 3252-001 she.phot — condemnation: Dependence / Creatureliness, HUMAN (changed from Divine-Human Correspondence)

set.notes: The moral/spiritual condition (unbelief, doubt, moral failure) as grounds of condemnation. Inner state is what the person is/has. AVs Mar 16:16 and Rom 14:23 confirm. Automated label confirmed.

Freedom from condemnation — inner security of person whose condemnation is withheld/overcome by Christ. Characteristic is security and trust grounded in Christ's intercession. AVs Joh 8:11 and Rom 8:34 confirm. Automated label confirmed.
Self-condemned — inner moral condition (warped, sinful) that turns conscience against the self. AV Tit 3:11 names warped/sinful as the self-condemning condition. Automated label confirmed.

Divine judgment flows from inner moral condition of those judged (scoffer, fool). Primary inner-being content is the moral character that draws judgment. AV Pro 19:29 confirms. Automated label confirmed.

Condemnation as inner weight/burden falling on the conscience — felt experiential state. Contrast with freedom of righteousness reinforces emotional register. Changed from automated Moral Character to Emotion — Negative.

operations.description: 738-001 katakrisis — condemnation: Emotion — Negative, HUMAN (changed from Moral Character)

set.notes: Fearful expectation of divine verdict — inner state of dread orienting the inner life toward moral accountability. Heb 10:27 directly names fearful expectation. Automated label confirmed.

operations.description: Registry 24 (condemnation): Dimension Review complete under v2.2
